title: Complete physical hardware and media inventory workflow
intent: Provide a read-only, evidence-backed inventory process for Cube and four Pi nodes without fabricating physical facts or starting cluster services.
proof_hooks: git diff --check; nix flake check --no-build --no-update-lock-file; nix develop --accept-flake-config -c ./scripts/validate-repo.sh; decapod validate
deferred_questions: Keep all nodes BLOCKED until physical inspection, MAC/reservation verification, power/cooling/media evidence, and operator approval are recorded.
